description: A business needs to calculate the annual depreciation expense for a vehicle it purchased during the year.

nodes.task_description: Gather the vehicle's cost basis, date placed in service, and percentage of business use.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary information for the calculation.

nodes.task_description: Determine the correct depreciation method and recovery period under MACRS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the asset class and depreciation schedule.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the annual depreciation deduction using Form 4562.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the allowable depreciation for the year.
